calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Apr-20-2026 Dismissal

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-19-2025 Set For Trial On Apr-20-26 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280
Off Calendar Dec-03-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I, LLC, AS ASSIGNEE OF CAPITAL ONE , N.A. Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To Ccp 2033.280.

Plaintiff Cavalry SPV I, LLC's unopposed Motion For Order That Matters In Request For Admissions Be Deemed Admitted Pursuant To CCP 2033.280 is GRANTED.

The record demonstrates Defendant Jack D. Knox did not provide any responses to Plaintiff's Request For Admissions. Set One. (See Code of Civil Procedure section 2033.280.) Defendant's failure to timely respond is not excused. No meet and confer requirement when no responses have been provided. Plaintiffs, however, met and conferred.

Plaintiffs' RFAs, Set One are deemed admitted.

Counsel for the prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the court's ruling and must drop a hard courtesy copy in Dept. 302's inbox.
Judge: Joseph M. Quinn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (302/JMQ)
